reports.label: P01 Maya — Home → Sport one day → basketball + vertical jump → build → review → execute
reports.userStory: In-season basketball player opens Sport-Focused one-day flow, picks basketball + vertical jump, lower body 45 min, builds workout, reviews blocks, starts training.
reports.expectedUserOutcome: Athletic lower-body session with jump/plyo transfer — not bodybuilding filler or Zone 2 steady cardio.

stepTraces.description: User lands on home — sees Goal-Oriented and Sport-Focused cards
User taps Sport-Focused Training → One day
stepTraces.userExpectation: Sport setup form opens in day scope (not week)

stepTraces.description: User searches sport list and taps Basketball chip
stepTraces.userExpectation: Basketball appears in ranked sport slot 1

stepTraces.description: User taps Vertical Jump sub-focus under basketball
User taps Lower body bias chip
stepTraces.userExpectation: One-day body region set to lower

stepTraces.description: User sets intensity to Medium (Fresh/Fatigued/Medium row)
stepTraces.userExpectation: Energy maps to medium for generation

stepTraces.description: Build workout CTA enabled after sport + sub-focus selected
stepTraces.userExpectation: User can proceed — not blocked by missing sport

stepTraces.description: User taps Build workout — loading screen then recommendation
stepTraces.userExpectation: Generated workout visible with blocks; user can swap exercises

stepTraces.description: Generation inputs reflect UI selections (basketball + vertical_jump)
stepTraces.userExpectation: sportGoalContext matches what user configured in form

stepTraces.description: User taps Start workout → Execute screen
stepTraces.userExpectation: User can log sets — session is actionable

outputAnalysis.narrativeSummary: In-season court athlete wants jump/COD transfer — not a bodybuilding pump day. Output aligns with persona intent. Main work: Single Leg Lateral Pogos, Single Leg Linear Pogos, Knee Jump, Oscillatory Bulgarians.

expectationResults.label: Plyometric / jump transfer
expectationResults.evidence: Jump/plyo present (Single Leg Lateral Pogos, Single Leg Linear Pogos, Knee Jump)

expectationResults.label: No steady-state Zone 2 on explosive day
